message:
Analyze this email and determine if it contains information about a financial investment (like FD, PPF, Mutual Fund, Stocks, Bonds, etc.).

Email Subject: [developerajendra] A security advisory on @angular/compiler affects at least one of your repositories
Email Content: 1 repository in your GitHub account might be affected by a security vulnerability found in @angular/compiler Angular has XSS Vulnerability via Unsanitized SVG Script Attributes (high severity) @angular/compiler (npm) used in 1 repository: - developerajendra/ng7-node-express-mongodb - Vulnerability found in package.json https://github.com/developerajendra/ng7-node-express-mongodb/security/dependabot/184 - Vulnerability found in package-lock.json https://github.com/developerajendra/ng7-node-express-mongodb/security/dependabot/186

Return ONLY a JSON object with:
{
  "isInvestmentEmail": true or false,
  "confidence": number between 0 and 1
}
systemPrompt: You are a financial email analyzer. Analyze emails and determine if they contain investment information. Return ONLY valid JSON with "isInvestmentEmail" (boolean) and "confidence" (number 0-1) fields.
